name: conda-forge
description: conda-forge is a community-led conda package channel providing over 33,000 open-source packages for scientific computing, data science, and general Python development.

knowsAbout.name: Anaconda.org Package API
knowsAbout.description: REST API for querying conda-forge package metadata, version histories, and distribution file details.

knowsAbout.name: conda-forge Channel Repodata
knowsAbout.description: Static JSON index files for each supported platform subdirectory enumerating all available conda packages with versions, build strings, checksums, and dependency specifications.

offers.name: conda-forge Open Source Packages
offers.description: Free and open-source conda packages for scientific computing and data science.
